title: Search Functionality for Users and Photos
description: Implement search across users and photos. Build search UI with unified search bar in navigation. User search matches on username and display name. Photo search matches on AI-generated tags, captions, and manual tags. Implement Postgres full-text search for performance. Display search results with appropriate cards for each type. Include recent searches and search suggestions. Out of scope: Advanced filters (date range, camera type, etc.).
